title: EMsee
description: lets EMC values for items when using Item Alchemy be visible only to players with EMsee custom advancement
body:
Adds an Advancement (emsee:emc_visible) that allows only players with it to see the EMC values presented as a tooltip to items by Item Alchemy for fabric 1.20.1
created for use the uam modpack by Mr_Ron but can be used by others that wish to
